mapper.sql: select id, product_id, sku_id, source_platform, base_price, current_price, activity_type, activity_price, activity_name, activity_rules, min_order_qty, max_order_qty, stock_quantity, freight_amount, free_shipping_threshold, delivery_days, delivery_area, customer_type, valid_from, valid_until, raw_data, collected_at, synced_at from yy_price_comparison
mapper.select: select t1.* from yy_price_comparison t1 inner join ( select sku_id, source_platform, max(id) as max_id from yy_price_comparison where sku_id = #{skuId} and customer_type = #{customerType} and (valid_until is null or valid_until > now()) group by sku_id, source_platform ) t2 on t1.id = t2.max_id order by case when activity_price is not null then activity_price else current_price end + freight_amount asc
mapper.insert: insert into yy_price_comparison ( product_id, sku_id, source_platform, base_price, current_price, activity_type, activity_price, activity_name, activity_rules, min_order_qty, max_order_qty, stock_quantity, freight_amount, free_shipping_threshold, delivery_days, delivery_area, customer_type, valid_from, valid_until, raw_data, collected_at ) values ( #{productId}, #{skuId}, #{sourcePlatform}, #{basePrice}, #{currentPrice}, #{activityType}, #{activityPrice}, #{activityName}, #{activityRules}, #{minOrderQty}, #{maxOrderQty}, #{stockQuantity}, #{freightAmount}, #{freeShippingThreshold}, #{deliveryDays}, #{deliveryArea}, #{customerType}, #{validFrom}, #{validUntil}, #{rawData}, #{collectedAt} )

insert into yy_price_comparison ( product_id, sku_id, source_platform, base_price, current_price, activity_type, activity_price, activity_name, activity_rules, min_order_qty, max_order_qty, stock_quantity, freight_amount, free_shipping_threshold, delivery_days, delivery_area, customer_type, valid_from, valid_until, raw_data, collected_at ) values
( #{item.productId}, #{item.skuId}, #{item.sourcePlatform}, #{item.basePrice}, #{item.currentPrice}, #{item.activityType}, #{item.activityPrice}, #{item.activityName}, #{item.activityRules}, #{item.minOrderQty}, #{item.maxOrderQty}, #{item.stockQuantity}, #{item.freightAmount}, #{item.freeShippingThreshold}, #{item.deliveryDays}, #{item.deliveryArea}, #{item.customerType}, #{item.validFrom}, #{item.validUntil}, #{item.rawData}, #{item.collectedAt} )
mapper.delete:
delete from yy_price_comparison where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: select DATE(collected_at) as date, source_platform as platformCode, avg(base_price) as basePrice, avg(COALESCE(activity_price, current_price)) as activityPrice, avg(COALESCE(activity_price, current_price) + freight_amount) as totalCost, max(activity_type) as activityType, max(collected_at) as collectedAt from yy_price_comparison where sku_id = #{skuId} and source_platform = #{platformCode} and collected_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) group by DATE(collected_at), source_platform order by date asc

select count(distinct sku_id) as totalProducts, count(distinct case when activity_type is not null and activity_type != 'none' then sku_id end) as productWithActivity, count(distinct source_platform) as platformCount, avg(case when activity_price is not null then current_price - activity_price else 0 end) as avgSavedAmount from yy_price_comparison where customer_type = #{customerType} and (valid_until is null or valid_until > now())
mapper.delete: delete from yy_price_comparison where collected_at < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{expireDays} DAY)
